misc.title: Except @SHAQ's wearing a shirt promoting the live action which is a grand total of 16 episodes that I have no doubt he's seen. The fact of the matter is we just don't like you @LoganPaul. Go back to g
misc.text: Except @SHAQ's wearing a shirt promoting the live action which is a grand total of 16 episodes that I have no doubt he's seen. The fact of the matter is we just don't like you @LoganPaul. Go back to getting punched in the face for a living since it's what your best at. 👍 Logan Paul (@LoganPaul) Look at this larper LOL!! @SHAQ The way I see it, only people who have read all 108 volumes and 1100 chapters of the One Piece manga, watched all 1100 episodes of the anime, went to at least TWO Comic Cons cosplaying as Monkey D Luffy, and watched both seasons of the live action should even be allowed to SAY the name “One Piece” let alone wear One Piece merchandise! shame on you Shaquille O’Neal 🤮 one piece community let’s get him!! — https://nitter.net/LoganPaul/status/2049910331489628625#m
